hero.title: TeamOps Feature
hero.subtitle: Have an idea to improve TeamOps? We'd love to hear your suggestions for new features, improvements, or fixes.

form.title: Submit Your Idea

description.label: Feature Description
description.placeholder: Describe the feature or improvement you'd like to see...

form.success: Thank you! Your feature request has been submitted successfully.
form.error: There was an error submitting your request. Please try again later.

submit.title: Submit
submit.description: Tell us about the feature you'd like to see in TeamOps

review.title: Review
review.description: Our team reviews all submissions and assesses feasibility

implement.title: Implement
implement.description: Popular and valuable features get added to our roadmap

board.title: Feature Request Board
board.subtitle: See what others have requested and vote for features you'd like to see. The most popular requests help us prioritize our roadmap.
board.empty: No feature requests yet. Be the first to submit one!
